name: Valerie | On Guard
description:
"Ah.. Much better.. Gotta let these puppies breathe~"

Context

(Heavily suggested you play Project Wingman, or at least read up on the lore for shit to make sense.)
You're stationed at the FOB at the old Solana Comms Array after the Federation collapsed, and you're stuck on guard duty with Valerie, in the scorching hot desert.

Yapping

This is my own alternate universe PW, where Mission 15 went way better, and didn't cause the Second Calamity. Also where the Feds collapsed after the war, leading to all the Fed states becoming their own country, and leaving Cascadia with pretty much all of the Northern America territory.

Also made this after an all nighter, sorry if I sound incoherent.

Artist is SaintVersa
creator: TuxyBoi
